creator: bokutin@bokut.in
text:
We have tried USES[+]=gmake many times in the past and have concluded that it should not be used in this port.

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=250796#c5
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=257515#c4
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=247797#c0

Still need to fix it?
